feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Power BI connectivity to SAP
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are in the process of integrating Power BI with SAP; however, we are facing an issue while connecting to the SAP system. The error details are attached for reference. We would appreciate it if you could advise on any required documentation, configuration steps, or SAP Notes that should be followed to resolve this issue and enable a successful connection.

Regards,
Prateek Prajapati

entry.title: activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000 but it is not active in client-100
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

In client-000, we opened the client via SCC4 and SE06, then using transaction SFW5 we successfully activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000. We don't see this function set activated in client-100. Shouldn't this activation be client independent? Can you please advice. 

Thanks,

Gus

entry.title: How to reduce the investment support for assets acquired in the current fiscal year
entry.content:
Dear expert，

As per business requirements, we plan to activate Fixed Assets – Special Valuation – Investment Support.However, we encountered an issue during testing:None of the transaction types in AO83 can realize the reduction of government subsidy amounts for assets acquired in the current year.Specifically, we need to perform a reverse posting for transaction type I**.

entry.title: SAP Fiori App Installation
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a Custom Fiori app using CDS View and ODATA and i can run it successfully from my local macine thro Visual Studio. When i try to deploy that app in s4 hana i get the below ERROR.

Can you please help!!

npm verbose cli C:\Program Files odejs ode.exe C:\Program Files odejs ode_modules pm in pm-cli.js
npm info using npm@11.12.1
npm info using node@v24.15.0
npm verbose title npm run build
npm verbose argv "run" "build"
npm verbose logfile logs-max:10 dir:C:\Users\NQ10073265\AppData\Local pm-cache\_logs\2026-05-11T11_04_28_740Z-
npm verbose logfile C:\Users\NQ10073265\AppData\Local pm-cache\_logs\2026-05-11T11_04_28_740Z-debug-0.log
npm warn Unknown env config "ui5-abap-password". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown env config "ui5-abap-user". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown user config "UI5_ABAP_USER". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown user config "UI5_ABAP_PA

entry.title: How to change confirmation control key in PO, those has partial GRN completed
entry.content: The confirmation control key (Z001) needs to be updated in purchase orders that have partially completed GRNs.

entry.title: France B2B e-invoicing 2026 - correct eDocument process code in DRC (FR_B2B vs FRSINV)?
entry.content:
Configuring SAP S/4HANA for the French B2B e-invoicing mandate (PA/Y-model, September 2026). Two specific questions:

1. Process code: Is FR_B2B the correct eDocument process code for outbound B2B invoices under the France PA mandate, or is FRSINV still current? We understand FRSINV may be legacy Chorus Pro / pilot. Is FR_B2B_CRN the correct type for credit notes (avoir)?

2. SAP as PA: SAP was announced as a certified Plateforme Agréée in February 2026. Does this mean customers using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance cloud edition (BTP) can transmit without contracting a separate third-party PDP? Is this limited to DRC Cloud Edition only?

Context: deploying for a customer using SAP DRC. Would be interested to hear from practitioners on both On-Premise and DRC Cloud Edition.

Any practitioner who has gone live or is in active testing for France B2B PA would be extremely helpful.

entry.title: Discrepancy MB5B & report J3RFLVMOBVEDH
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are observing a discrepancy between transaction MB5B and report J3RFLVMOBVEDH for the same selection criteria.

Analysis performed:

* Verified material movements through MB51
* Checked stock in MMBE
* Validated valuation data in MBEW
* No obvious data inconsistency identified

Request you to help analyze:

1. Difference in calculation logic
2. Whether any SAP Notes exist
3. Expected standard system behavior

 

Thanks and regard,

Kapil Birajdar.

entry.title: the error message AAPO149 occurred in ABT1N
entry.content:
Hello,

As we created document in ABT1N with revenue in SAP HANA edition, and the error message AAPO149 occurred. But created the same scenario in SAP ECC edition, which would generate the accounting document successfully.

We checked the configuration,  the error message AAPO149 occurred seems be caused by the two company code (0003 and A001) assigned to the same company ID (ABCD), but we are not sure about this. Does this configuration make the different results because of the different ERP edition?

entry.title: How I can control MOQ in a sales order not by SKU but all order
entry.content: Hello I want to control the MOQ in a sales order not only by sku , to the order

entry.title: MRP run considers substitute inventory
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA On-Premise edition. When running MRP, we expect the inventory of alternative materials to be included in the supply scope to cover the requirement quantity of the main material.
 
Example as below:
Product PRD_K has three components MAT_A, MAT_B and MAT_C in its BOM. The three materials are mutually alternative materials with priority 1, 2 and 3 respectively.
Inventory quantity of MAT_A: 50
Inventory quantity of MAT_B: 30
Inventory quantity of MAT_C: 20
We expect the following result during MRP run:
The requirement quantity of MAT_A is 120. The available stock of MAT_A cannot fully cover the demand. After consuming all stock of MAT_A (50), the system consumes the stock of alternative material MAT_B (30). If the demand is still not satisfied, it continues to consume the stock of alternative material MAT_C (20). Finally, there is still a shortage of 20 units. At this point, the system shall generate a purchase requisition of 20 units for MAT_A.
 
How should we configure standard SAP settings or implement enhancement development in SAP to realize this business scenario?

entry.title: Loan Application enabling from FIRIO with Infotype 0045
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have a requirement to build a Loan Application in Fiori with workflow process .

and after all approvals the loan request to be updated in the IT0045.

we have built a custom application and try updating IT0045 using Infotype update function module HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION 

but we are facing some issues.

I would like to understand if there is any standard Loan application in fiori if not is there seperate FM or BADi to update IT0045

entry.title: Fiori List Report Issue with OData V4 VS V2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a OData V4 Fiori List Report Template.

Here are we are facing couple of Issue
Backend CDS View is Parameterized CDS View.

So the CDS Parameters are going to be Mandatory for the Selection or execute. Here when we are trying to add the new filter by using the Adopt filter options those filters are also showing in UI as Mandatory. ( Only Visual as * )
Table Settings, When we are selecting the columns to display in V2 App we can see the options as Show Selected / select all columns. Here we are seeing it has Deselect all.

entry.title: Low value asset area 01 not maintained
entry.content:
We have maintained in the configuration in the system TS4 Tcode OAYK setting LVA amount 500 and Max LVA amount pur as 1000.
when we are posting the PO (Me23n ) or (F-90) for the amount of Rs 500 system is allowed to post without giving any error up to the limit of 600 . We want to understand the standard behavior how it will work in SAP.
Attached the PO & document number details

entry.title: scope items missing for EWM best practice for S/4 hana 2025
entry.content: scope items missing for EWM best practice for S/4 hana 2025

entry.title: In VL10C transaction, there is a limit for delivery date part.
entry.content:
In VL10C transaction, there is a limit for delivery date part. We are able to see orders for only 1 month.
But for export customers, we must see the orders for 2 months, So, please revise this rule from 30 days to 60 days. I've attached screenshot.

entry.title: Payment Credit Card Information migration from ECC to S4.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

credit card information is stored in VCKUN and VCNUM tables and these we need migrate. However, considering the ECC vs S4 data model changes, we also need to run the report RCC_MIGRATION to synchronize or migrate payment card data from the "old world" (VCNUM/VCKUN) to the "new world" (BUT0CC). 

Can you please let us know how to run RCC_MIGRATION report and update the BUT0CC table in S4.

regards

sanjay jadhav

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CHANGE – Custom PO Item fields not updated via EXTENSIONIN
entry.content:
Business Requirement

Custom fields appended to EKPO (via CI_EKPODB / CI_EKPODBX) must be updated programmatically when modifying Purchase Order items using BAPI_PO_CHANGE.

The update is required for backend integration and batch processing, without manual intervention in ME22N.

 

Issue Description

When updating custom PO item fields EKPO-MFGID, etc using BAPI_PO_CHANGE with EXTENSIONIN, the following inconsistent behavior is observed:

  1. Custom fields are not updated in EKPO, even though:
    • BAPI_PO_CHANGE executes successfully
    • No errors are returned in the RETURN table
    • Transaction commit is executed successfully
  3. No explicit error or warning is raised by the BAPI when extension processing is skipped

This makes it difficult to identify whether the issue lies in:

  • SAP standard extension handling
  • Expected structure naming in EXTENSIONIN

 

Tec

entry.title: Situation Handling – 3-Level Escalation for Overdue Maintenance Activity in SAP S/4 Cloud Public E
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and have a requirement to implement a 3-level escalation for overdue  Maintenance activity using Situation Handling.

Business Requirement: When a maintenance activity is not completed within the planned date, the system should automatically escalate as follows:

  • Level 1 — Notify the Maintenance Supervisor / Planner
  • Level 2 — Escalate to the Maintenance Manager
  • Level 3 — Escalate to the Maintenance HOD (Head of Department)

Questions:

  1. Is it possible to configure a sequential 3-level escalation using Situation Handling natively in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. Is Batch Job Scheduling within Situation Handling sufficient to drive this, or do we need to combine it with Flexible Workflow?
  3. Are there any known limitations of Situation Handling for this use case in Public Cloud?

    Any configuration guidance, blog references, or real-world experience would be greatly appreciated.

    Thank you!

    Sriram R

entry.title: Change log report for reservation
entry.content:
IN ME22N Tcode(PO Change) We have Environment tab we found header changes and item changes.
Same, we need to implement in the MB22 Tcode. There is an environment tab, but there is no scope to view the header and item changes. so we need to incorporate the header and item changes regarding reservations.

In report level also like MB25 , There is no scope to view the change log regarding reservation.

In table level(RESB) we found header changes.So need to incorporate the change log regarding reservation.

For example, in reservation we have 4 line items, the first lineitem ''X'' user deleted and the next line item ''Y' user changed the quantity here We need to view the changes like Which user changed the data. (Either X Or Y).

entry.title: Cost center company code change from LTIN to LTUD
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While creating a cost center 494LE wrong we mapped to LTIN company code. Now need to correct it as LTUD. Still now no cost is booked in this cost center.  Kindly help us to correct it.

Regards,

Arun
